name: Grilled Chicken Bowl
description: Grilled chicken breast with steamed brown rice and sautéed greens. Low sugar, high protein — ideal for diabetics.

name: Palak Dal
description: Slow-cooked yellow lentils with fresh spinach, turmeric and cumin. High fiber, low glycaemic load — excellent for blood sugar control.

name: Mixed Vegetable Oats Upma
description: Steel-cut oats cooked with seasonal vegetables and mild spices. Slow-digesting carbs — minimal blood sugar spike.

name: Paneer Butter Masala with Roti
description: Cottage cheese in mildly spiced tomato-butter gravy with 2 rotis. Moderate sugar from tomato base — consume in half portions.

name: Fruit and Nut Yoghurt Bowl
description: Plain yoghurt with seasonal fruits and mixed nuts. Natural sugars — moderate for diabetics.

name: Corn and Chickpea Salad
description: Boiled corn and chickpeas with lime dressing and herbs. Natural sugars from corn — high fibre offsets glycaemic impact.

name: Mango Lassi Large
description: Full-cream yoghurt blended with Alphonso mango pulp and sugar. Very high sugar — strongly avoid if diabetic.

name: Gulab Jamun 2 pcs
description: Deep-fried milk dumplings soaked in sugar syrup. Extremely high sugar — not suitable for diabetics.

name: Nutella Banana Crepe
description: Thin wheat crepe filled with Nutella and fresh banana. High sugar from both hazelnut spread and banana — avoid for diabetes.

name: Steamed Idli with Coconut Chutney
description: Freshly steamed rice-lentil idli with homemade coconut chutney. Naturally low sodium — one of the safest options for hypertension.

name: Roasted Chickpea Bowl
description: Oven-roasted chickpeas with turmeric, cumin and lime zest. No added salt. High potassium supports healthy blood pressure.

name: Fresh Watermelon Juice
description: Cold-pressed watermelon juice, no added sugar or salt. L-citrulline in watermelon supports blood vessel relaxation.

name: Egg Fried Brown Rice
description: Wok-tossed brown rice with whole eggs and mixed vegetables. Moderate sodium from soy sauce — half portion recommended.

name: Grilled Paneer Tikka
description: Marinated paneer cubes grilled with peppers and onions. Moderate sodium from marinade — occasional use acceptable.

name: Tomato Soup No Cream
description: Blended tomato soup with basil and black pepper. On the higher end for hypertension — consume occasionally.

name: Instant Masala Ramen
description: Masala-flavoured instant noodles with rich soup base. One bowl exceeds 75% of daily sodium limit — avoid with hypertension.

name: Gourmet Chicken Burger
description: Crispy fried chicken patty with cheese, pickles, and sriracha mayo. Very high sodium from cheese and pickles — avoid with hypertension.

name: Cheese Loaded Nachos
description: Corn tortilla chips with cheddar cheese sauce and jalapeños. High sodium from cheese sauce — not suitable for hypertension management.

name: Plain Rice with Sambar
description: Plain white rice with South Indian lentil sambar. Free from soy, dairy, and peanuts — one of the cleanest canteen options.

name: Grilled Fish with Steamed Vegetables
description: Grilled basa fillet with steamed broccoli and carrots. Completely free from soy, dairy, and peanuts.

name: Fresh Fruit Platter
description: Seasonal fruits — papaya, watermelon, guava, banana. Zero allergen risk. High in vitamins and antioxidants.

name: Veg Biryani
description: Fragrant basmati rice with vegetables and whole spices. May contain traces of soy sauce. Processed near milk and nut products.

name: Chocolate Brownie
description: Dense chocolate brownie. Contains dairy. May contain soy lecithin and traces of peanuts from shared equipment.

name: Hummus and Pita Bread
description: Chickpea hummus with tahini and olive oil, served with pita. No dairy or peanut. Soy-free. Sesame allergy caution.

name: Peanut Butter Toast
description: Thick-cut white bread with natural peanut butter and honey. PRIMARY peanut allergen — severe risk for peanut allergy. Processed near dairy.

name: Creamy Mushroom Pasta
description: Penne in heavy cream-mushroom sauce with Parmesan. Contains dairy (cream, Parmesan). May contain soy emulsifiers. Not suitable for dairy or soy allergy.

name: Tofu Stir Fry with Edamame
description: Wok-tossed tofu and edamame with soy sauce and sesame oil. PRIMARY soy allergen — tofu, edamame, and soy sauce are all soy-derived. Not suitable for soy allergy.
